{{Item
| name = 
| image = Salmon sushi.png
| id = salmon_sushi
| type = Food
| Subtype = Rice
| Properties = Hunger points: 4/10
| stackable = 64
}}

'''Sake Nigiri Sushi''' is a rice-related food item that gives you 4 hunger points.  

Your dog can also eat this, so don't be shy to share it with your furry pal!

== Obtaining ==

=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!Recipe
|-
|[[Rice Bowl]]+ Salmon
|[[File:Salmon sushi crafting.png]]
|}
==Usage==
*'''<code>Right click</code>''' to use the item.
==Trivia==
*The item was also known as Salmon Sushi.
*It was added in DTN 1.17.2.
